message.content:
@startuml
participant "User" as User
participant "«main» Administration" as Admin
participant "«JFrame» Main Menu" as MainMenu
participant "«dialog» View Products" as ViewProducts
participant "«DAO» ProductManagerdao" as ProductManagerdao
participant "«DAO» DbConnection" as DbConnection

User -> Admin : construct
Admin -> MainMenu : construct
MainMenu -> ViewProducts : construct
ViewProducts -> ProductManagerdao : construct
ProductManagerdao -> DbConnection : getConnection(uri)

DbConnection -> ProductManagerdao : connection
ProductManagerdao -> DbConnection : prepareStatement(sql)
ProductManagerdao -> DbConnection : executeQuery()
ProductManagerdao -> DbConnection : getters retrieve product details
ProductManagerdao -> DbConnection : setters set product details
ProductManagerdao -> ViewProducts : product
ViewProducts -> ProductManagerdao : setModel(displayProducts)

User -> ViewProducts : enter a product ID in search bar
ViewProducts -> ProductManagerdao : searchbyIDTxt.getText()
ProductManagerdao -> ViewProducts : searchProduct(searchID)

ProductManagerdao -> DbConnection : getConnection(uri)
DbConnection -> ProductManagerdao : connection
ProductManagerdao -> DbConnection : prepareStatement(sql)
ProductManagerdao -> DbConnection :.setString(1, searchProdID)
ProductManagerdao -> DbConnection : executeQuery()
ProductManagerdao -> DbConnection : getters retrieve product details
ProductManagerdao -> DbConnection : setters set product details
ProductManagerdao -> ViewProducts : product searched for (p)
ViewProducts -> Admin : updateitems(returnedProduct)
Admin -> User : waiting for further user action

@enduml
